tasks.title: Add tour-progress body schema to @repo/schemas
tasks.description: Add TourProgressBodySchema ({ tourId: z.string().min(1).max(100), version: z.number().int().nonnegative() }) next to the whats-new http schemas pattern (entities/user/ or a tour entity dir — match whats-new.http.schema.ts conventions). NOTE: UserSettingsSchema.onboarding.adminTours ALREADY EXISTS (SPEC-175 T-002) — no settings delta needed. Export inferred type + wire into the barrel. Tests: valid body parses; empty tourId rejects; negative/float version rejects.

tasks.title: Add markAdminTourSeen service method (RMW merge)
tasks.description: Add markAdminTourSeen({ actor, tourId, version }) to packages/service-core/src/services/user/user.service.ts MIRRORING markWhatsNewSeen (read current settings, set settings.onboarding.adminTours[tourId] = version preserving ALL siblings incl. onboarding.whatsNew). The settings JSONB column is REPLACE-mode (D16) — defensive read-modify-write mandatory. Tests per spec §6.3: siblings preserved (incl. whatsNew.baselineAt/seenIds); upsert overwrites version for same tourId; missing onboarding initializes cleanly; Result<T> error paths.

tasks.title: Implement PATCH /api/v1/protected/users/me/tour-progress
tasks.description: Route apps/api/src/routes/user/protected/tourProgress.ts + registration in routes/user/protected/index.ts, MIRRORING whatsNewSeen.ts: createProtectedRoute, USER_SETTINGS_UPDATE guard (D16), customRateLimit { requests: 30, windowMs: 60000 }, body TourProgressBodySchema, delegates to markAdminTourSeen. Tests per spec §14: invalid body 400; valid 200 + service called; merge does not clobber sibling settings; 401 unauthenticated.

tasks.title: Extract config/ia/primitives.ts (I18nLabel + permission primitives)
tasks.description: Per spec §7.1: extract I18nLabelSchema + permission gate primitives from apps/admin/src/config/ia/schema.ts into NEW primitives.ts; schema.ts re-exports for backward compat (zero behavior change). Purpose: avoid ESM cycle with tour.schema.ts. ALL existing config tests must stay green (run test/config/ia/ + src/config/ia/__tests__/ — the full pre-existing suites, not just new files).

tasks.title: Create tour.schema.ts with Tour/Step shapes + KNOWN_DATA_TOUR_IDS
tasks.description: NEW apps/admin/src/config/ia/tour.schema.ts per spec §7.1: Tour { id, roles: 'all'|RoleEnum[], kind: 'welcome'|'contextual', route?, version int>0, trigger: 'auto-first-visit'|'manual', showWelcomeModal, steps[] }; Step { id, target: 'center'|'data-tour:<id>', title/body I18nLabel, side?, align?, permissions? }; KNOWN_DATA_TOUR_IDS registry (initial set per §7.7: main-menu, main-menu-section-<id>, sidebar, dashboard-region, quick-create, command-palette, notifications, user-menu, bottom-nav). Imports from primitives.ts. Unit tests: valid tour parses; contextual requires route; welcome forbids route; unique step ids; bad target shape rejects.

tasks.title: Wire tours into AdminIAConfigSchema with cross-checks T1-T3
tasks.description: Modify apps/admin/src/config/ia/schema.ts: add tours: ToursRecordSchema to AdminIAConfigSchema + superRefine cross-checks per spec §7.1: T1 every non-center target ∈ KNOWN_DATA_TOUR_IDS; T2 roles !== 'all' → each role exists in config.roles and is enabled; T3 contextual route equals some section.route/defaultRoute. Negative tests for each cross-check (bad target / disabled role / unknown route fail safeParse). Run the FULL pre-existing config suites after.

tasks.title: Create tours.ts initial catalog + index.ts wiring
tasks.description: NEW apps/admin/src/config/ia/tours.ts typed z.input<typeof ToursRecordSchema> with the 4 WELCOME tours (host/editor/admin/superAdmin .welcome per spec §9 step outlines, real es/en/pt content for greeting + menu + dashboard + quick-create + help steps) and STUBS ready for the 15 contextual tours (added in T-016). Wire tours into rawConfig in config/ia/index.ts (validate.ts already parses all — boot validation must stay green). Confirm routes against sections.ts. Tests: catalog parses through full config; welcome tours resolve for each enabled role.

tasks.title: Implement pure lib/tour modules (4) + unit tests
tasks.description: apps/admin/src/lib/tour/ per spec §7.3 (pure, no React/DOM): compare-version.ts shouldOfferTour({ configVersion, seenVersion }); resolve-step-text.ts locale fallback (align with use-localized-label.ts); build-driver-steps.ts Tour→DriveStep[] (permission filter via expandPermissions ∩ userPermissions, 'center'→no element, 'data-tour:x'→[data-tour="x"], localized title/body, side/align; import type only for driver.js types); decide-auto-trigger.ts per D9+D13: welcome > contextual priority, version-aware, returns 'welcome-redirect' decision when welcome eligible but route !== dashboard. Unit tests: shouldOfferTour truth table; locale matrix; buildDriverSteps center/data-tour/permission-filter; decideAutoTrigger matrix incl. D13 redirect case and seen-suppression.

tasks.title: Implement use-admin-tour-state.ts (Query + PATCH mutation)
tasks.description: apps/admin/src/hooks/use-admin-tour-state.ts per spec §7.5: useQuery ['user','settings',userId] against the owner-scoped protected GET (NOT the dead admin-tier hooks); useMutation → PATCH /users/me/tour-progress with optimistic update + invalidate. Expose hasSeen(tourId, version) (seenVersion>=configVersion semantics via shouldOfferTour) and markSeen({ tourId, version }). Tests: load lifecycle; markSeen optimistic + correct body; rollback on failure.

tasks.title: Add driver.js + tour-context.tsx engine + TourWelcomeModal
tasks.description: Install driver.js in apps/admin (D2 owner-approved dependency-policy exception — document in PR). apps/admin/src/contexts/tour-context.tsx per spec §7.4: TourProvider + useTour() { isRunning, activeTourId, startTour({ tourId }), stopTour() }; startTour: trackEvent admin.tour.shown → TourWelcomeModal (Radix Dialog, Saltar/Mostrame) when showWelcomeModal → lazy import('driver.js') → buildDriverSteps → run spotlight (showProgress, allowClose, keyboard, localized chrome via t('admin-common.tour.*')) → finish/skip → markSeen + trackEvent completed|skipped. Driver instance in useRef, destroyed on unmount. Driver CSS import + admin theme overrides in styles.css. prefers-reduced-motion → animate:false. Components/whats-new pattern for component dir. Tests: welcome modal Saltar/Mostrame; startTour event flow with driver mocked; reduced-motion flag.

tasks.title: Implement use-tours.ts selectors
tasks.description: apps/admin/src/hooks/use-tours.ts per spec §7.2: useTourById, useToursForRole, useWelcomeTourForRole, useContextualTourForRoute({ pathname }) matching via useCurrentSection() → tour.route === (section.defaultRoute ?? section.route). RO-RO, named exports. Tests: role resolution incl. D14 reuse (SUPER_ADMIN gets admin.* contextual + super-specific plataforma/analisis); route matching; unknown role → empty.

tasks.title: Add data-tour attributes across layout components
tasks.description: Per spec §7.7 (additive, zero behavior change): main-menu + main-menu-section-<id> (MainMenu.tsx), sidebar (Sidebar.tsx), dashboard-region (dashboard page), quick-create (QuickCreate.tsx), command-palette + notifications (Header.tsx), user-menu (header-user.tsx), bottom-nav (BottomNav.tsx). Keep KNOWN_DATA_TOUR_IDS in sync (T-005 registry). Steps with permission-gated targets must carry matching permissions or tolerate absence (driver.js skips; adminLogger.warn). CRITICAL: run ALL pre-existing suites touching these components (Header.test.tsx, BottomNav.test.tsx, MainMenu/Sidebar suites — rg -l the component names over test dirs) before committing.

tasks.title: Implement TourAutoTrigger with D13 redirect + D12 whats-new suppression
tasks.description: apps/admin/src/components/tour/TourAutoTrigger.tsx (headless) per spec §7.6 + D13: useEffect keyed [pathname, isLoaded, role]; bail if !isLoaded || isRunning || !role; decideAutoTrigger; when decision is 'welcome-redirect' (welcome eligible, route !== dashboard) navigate({ to: '/dashboard' }) and let the dashboard pass fire the tour; redirect ONLY when tour will actually be offered, never post-seen/skip, never for manual replay. Double-rAF before startTour (data-tour targets painted). useRef latch per pathname (strict mode). Mount in AppLayout below _authed. D12 WIRING: pass suppressed={welcomeTourUnseen} to the existing WhatsNewAutoTrigger so the What's New auto-modal defers while the welcome tour is pending (seam shipped in SPEC-175). Tests: no fire while loading; fires once; redirect case; no redirect when seen; suppression passed correctly; latch.

tasks.title: Add Ver guia entry points + tour i18n chrome keys
tasks.description: Modify apps/admin/src/integrations/clerk/header-user.tsx per spec §7.8: 'Ver guía' (relaunch role welcome via useWelcomeTourForRole; manual replay ignores version but markSeen on finish) + 'Ver guía de esta página' (only when useContextualTourForRoute returns a tour). Add tour.* chrome keys (next/prev/done/skip/replay/replayPage) to the admin i18n bundle es/en/pt (follow admin-whats-new.json wiring pattern in packages/i18n: imports + rawTranslations + namespaces array, or extend admin-common if that is where chrome strings live — match existing). Tests: items by role/route; replay ignores version. Run pre-existing header-user suites.

tasks.title: A11y pass: reduced-motion, focus, keyboard
tasks.description: Per spec §7.9: verify driver.js focus trap + restore, ESC/overlay skip, keyboard nav enabled; prefers-reduced-motion → animate:false + drop Dialog enter/exit animation; aria on welcome modal (Radix handles base). Add targeted tests where feasible (reduced-motion flag propagation, ESC handling in welcome modal).

tasks.title: Author the 15 contextual mini-tours content (es/en/pt)
tasks.description: Complete tours.ts with the 15 contextual tours per spec §9 table (host: misAlojamientos/consultas/miFacturacion/miCuenta; editor: editorial/analisis/miCuenta; admin: catalogo/editorial/comunidad/comercial/plataforma/analisis; superAdmin: plataforma/analisis variants — D14). Confirm every route against sections.ts; add per-section data-tour anchors where a mini-tour needs them (extend T-012 registry accordingly). Friendly, non-technical es content (en/pt translations); steps follow D7 (inline I18nLabel). Config boot validation green; cross-check tests still pass.

tasks.title: Backend integration tests: tour-progress with real DB
tasks.description: vitest e2e suite (vitest.config.e2e.ts pattern, real DB, restore via afterEach per SPEC-175 lesson): PATCH persists tourId→version in settings.onboarding.adminTours; sibling preservation incl. whatsNew keys (mirror of SPEC-175 AC-17 from the other side); upsert same tourId; version semantics; 401/400 paths with real middleware.

tasks.title: Admin integration tests: full tour flows (cross-surface)
tasks.description: Testing Library integration per spec §14: welcome auto-fires once on dashboard when unseen (driver.js mocked); D13 redirect from non-dashboard route; suppressed WhatsNewAutoTrigger while welcome unseen, releases after finish/skip (D12 end-to-end in component tree); contextual fires on first section visit; version bump re-offers; manual replay ignores version; markSeen wiring. SWEEP RULE (SPEC-175 lesson): before finishing, rg -l every touched component/config symbol over apps/admin/test and src __tests__ dirs and run ALL matching pre-existing suites, not just new files.
